title: How do I reset my password?
content: Go to Settings > Security > Reset Password. Enter the verification code sent to your email and create a new password. If the option is missing, contact support with your account email.

title: How do I change my current password?
content: Open Profile > Security > Change Password. Enter your old password, then set and confirm a new password. This action may require Admin privileges depending on workspace policy.

title: I forgot my password. What should I do?
content: Use the Forgot Password option on the sign-in page. Enter your registered email and follow the reset link. For security, you may be asked to re-authenticate before confirming changes.

title: Why am I not receiving password reset email?
content: Check spam and promotions folders, verify your registered email, and wait up to 5 minutes before retrying. Changes are usually reflected immediately after saving.

title: How do I unlock my account after failed login attempts?
content: Wait for the lockout timer to expire or use account recovery. Admins can also unlock users from Admin > Users. You can verify completion from the activity or audit section.

title: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
content: Go to Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication and scan the QR code with your authenticator app. If errors continue, capture screenshot and timestamp before contacting support.

title: How do I recover if I lose my MFA device?
content: Use your recovery codes from setup. If unavailable, contact support for identity verification and MFA reset. Enterprise workspaces may have extra controls set by admins.

title: How do I create an account?
content: Select Sign Up, enter your details, verify your email, then complete onboarding steps. Make sure your email is verified before attempting this action.

title: How do I verify my email address?
content: Open the verification email and click the confirm link. You can resend it from Profile > Email Settings. Use the latest app version for the best compatibility.

title: How do I update my email address?
content: Go to Profile > Personal Info, update your email, and confirm through the verification link. If retrying does not work, wait a few minutes and try again.

title: How do I delete my account?
content: Open Account Settings > Delete Account. Confirm deletion to permanently remove access and associated data. If the option is missing, contact support with your account email.

title: How do I reactivate a deleted account?
content: If within the recovery window, contact support with your account email to request restoration. This action may require Admin privileges depending on workspace policy.

title: How do I upgrade my subscription plan?
content: Go to Billing > Subscription and choose the desired plan. Upgrades usually apply immediately. For security, you may be asked to re-authenticate before confirming changes.

title: How do I downgrade my plan?
content: Open Billing > Subscription and select a lower tier. Downgrades normally apply at next billing cycle. Changes are usually reflected immediately after saving.

title: How do I cancel my subscription?
content: Go to Billing > Subscription > Cancel Plan and confirm. Access continues until the period ends. You can verify completion from the activity or audit section.

title: How do I request a refund?
content: Submit a refund request from Billing > Help or email billing support within the policy window. If errors continue, capture screenshot and timestamp before contacting support.

title: Where can I download invoices?
content: Go to Billing > Invoices and select the invoice to download as PDF. Enterprise workspaces may have extra controls set by admins.

title: How do I update payment method?
content: Navigate to Billing > Payment Methods, add a new card, and set it as default. Make sure your email is verified before attempting this action.

title: How do I remove an old payment card?
content: In Billing > Payment Methods, remove the card after ensuring another valid default method exists. Use the latest app version for the best compatibility.

title: Why did my payment fail?
content: Check card status, limits, and billing address. Retry with updated details or another payment method. If retrying does not work, wait a few minutes and try again.

title: How do I contact support?

title: How do I create an API key?

title: How do I rotate API keys safely?

title: Why am I getting 401 Unauthorized from API?

title: Why am I getting 429 Too Many Requests?
content: You exceeded rate limits. Implement retries with backoff and reduce request burst size. Enterprise workspaces may have extra controls set by admins.

title: How do I check API usage?

title: How do I invite team members?
